name: legacy.css
description: A classless CSS framework inspired by classic corporate administrative systems.
author: moises

scripts.build:js: mkdir -p dist && cp src/legacy.js dist/legacy.js && vite build
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:min && pnpm run build:js
scripts.build:docs: pnpm run build:all && mkdir -p docs/assets && cp dist/legacy.css docs/assets/legacy.css && cp dist/legacy.min.css docs/assets/legacy.min.css && cp dist/legacy.js docs/assets/legacy.js && cp dist/legacy.min.js docs/assets/legacy.min.js
